testcase.name: test_revoke_invite
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_16.py:161: in test_revoke_invite assert response.status_code == 200, f"Revoke failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Revoke failed: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_renew_invite
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_16.py:174: in test_renew_invite assert response.status_code == 200, f"Renew failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Renew failed: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_team_analytics_excludes_licensed_users
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_16.py:204: in test_team_analytics_excludes_licensed_users assert response.status_code == 200, f"Team analytics failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Team analytics failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
